habanero-pineapple-jam.name: Habanero Pineapple Jam

ingredients.item: Habanero peppers - stems and membranes removed

instructions: Drain pineapple well, reserving 1/2 cup pineapple juice.

Inspect eight 1/2-pint jars for cracks and rings for rust, discarding any defective ones. Wash new, unused lids and rings in warm soapy water. Place jars and lids on a rack in a large pot of boiling water; sterilize for about 5 minutes. Remove jars from water and place on a kitchen towel or wooden board.

Mix sugar, apple cider vinegar, and salt together in an 8-quart pot and cook over medium heat to dissolve the sugar. Bring to a boil and add pineapple, reserved pineapple juice, minced bell pepper, habanero peppers, and carrots. Bring back to a rapid boil for about 5 minutes, stirring constantly.

Add powdered pectin, 1 tablespoon at a time, mixing well after each addition. Let jam boil for 5 minutes, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and ladle into sterilized jars, leaving 1/4 inch at the top. Wipe off any spillage around the rims of the jars using a damp paper towel.

Screw on tops and rings. Place the sealed jars back in boiling water for 5 to 10 minutes. Remove jars from boiling water and place on a kitchen towel or wooden board. Allow to cool completely, 12 to 24 hours. The tops of your jars should pop as they start to cool and seal.

haldi-ka-doodh-hot-turmeric-milk.name: Haldi Ka Doodh (hot Turmeric Milk)
instructions: Whisk together turmeric, cardamom, black pepper, ginger, cloves, and allspice in a small bowl; set aside.
Heat milk in a small saucepan over medium heat until heated through, 3 to 4 minutes; stir honey and vanilla into milk until completely dissolved.
Whisk 1 teaspoon turmeric mixture into milk mixture; reduce heat to medium-low and simmer until flavors blend, 2 to 3 minutes. Pour mixture through a strainer.

halibut-meuniere-recipe-comedera.name: Halibut Meunière Recipe
instructions: Condimenta los filetes con sal y pimienta por ambos lados.
Coloca la harina de trigo en una plato y reboza el pescado salpimentado. Retira el exceso de harina.
Warm a frying pan and melt 3 tablespoons of butter.
Soak fish into butter from 5 to 6 minutes from each side or until golden and cooked.
Once ready, remove the steaks from the frying pan and book.
In that same frying pan, melt the other part of the butter and once it's already liquid, add the pits and lemon juice. Meg and cook for a minute.
Serve the steaks and baits with the sauce till juicy.

harcha-moroccan-semolina-bread.name: Harcha (moroccan Semolina Bread)

ingredients.prep: preferably coarse flour such as King Arthur brand, plus more for sprinkling

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal kosher salt; for table salt use half as much by volume

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk to fully combine semolina flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. Add melted butter and mix with your fingers until mixture has a sandy, crumbly texture.

Add milk and mix with your hands until dough comes together and forms a ball. It should be soft but not sticky. If dough is too wet, sprinkle 1 tablespoon semolina over top and knead in until absorbed. Repeat if needed until proper texture is achieved. Let it rest for 15 minutes to allow semolina to absorb the liquid.

Lightly dust a work surface with semolina and transfer dough to it. Using the palm of your hands, flatten dough into a 1/2-inch-thick circle, about 8 inches in diameter. Sprinkle dough’s surface with more semolina, then use a 3-inch round cookie cutter or glass to cut out discs. Gather dough scraps and reshape into 1/2-inch-thick round and cut out more discs; you should have 8 discs total. (Alternatively, divide the dough into eight equal portions and shape them into individual 1/2-inch-thick discs by hand.)

Heat a 12-inch cast-iron or stainless-steel skillet over medium-low heat for 3 minutes. Place 4 dough rounds in dry skillet and cook, pressing down occasionally with a spatula to prevent doming, until golden brown on first side, 5 to 7 minutes.

Flip flatbreads and continue to cook, adjusting heat as needed to prevent burning, until golden brown on second side, 3 to 5 minutes. Transfer cooked flatbreads to a parchment paper–lined baking sheet. Wipe skillet clean, then repeat with remaining 4 semolina breads. Serve immediately with your choice of spreads.

hashbrown-breakfast-casserole.name: Hashbrown Breakfast Casserole

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Line the bottom of a 13x9" baking dish with one 20-oz. package frozen hash brown patties, trimming to fit. Bake until golden brown and crisp, 15–20 minutes. Remove from oven; reduce oven temperature to 350°.

Meanwhile, heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Cook 1½ lb. bulk breakfast sausage, stirring and breaking up with a wooden spoon into marble-size pieces, until browned and just cooked through, 6–8 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer to a small bowl.

Add 1 large onion, finely chopped, to same pan and season with kosher salt. Cook, stirring occasionally, until slightly softened and starting to brown, about 3 minutes. Add 4 garlic cloves, coarsely chopped; cook, stirring often, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add one 10-oz. package frozen chopped spinach, thawed in bag, and any water in bag (this will help deglaze the pan); cook, stirring occasionally and scraping up any browned bits, until dried out, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat.

Whisk 18 large eggs, 1 cup heavy cream, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a large bowl; season generously with freshly ground black pepper. Stir in sausage, onion mixture, and 4 oz. extra-sharp cheddar cheese, coarsely grated; pour egg mixture over hash browns. Bake casserole until set and lightly browned on top, 40–50 minutes. Let cool slightly.
Do Ahead: Hash brown breakfast casserole can be baked 1 month ahead. Cut into pieces; wrap individually in plastic wrap and freeze. Unwrap and reheat on a baking sheet in a 350° oven 15 minutes.

hearty-ham-bone-black-bean-soup.name: Hearty Ham Bone Black Bean Soup

ingredients.item: Canned corn (such as green giant niblets®)
Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place ham bone in a large slow cooker.
Heat olive oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat. Add celery, onion, and garlic; sauté until onion is translucent, about 5 minutes. Add to slow cooker.

Sauté potatoes, bell pepper, and carrots in the same saucepan until coated in oil, about 1 minute; transfer to the slow cooker. Add water, black beans, vegetable juice, corn, tomatoes, green chiles, cumin, salt, and black pepper. Cover slow cooker.
Cook on High until warm, 45 to 60 minutes. Reduce heat to Low; continue cooking for 5 to 6 hours.
Remove ham bone from soup; separate meat from the bone. Add meat to soup; discard bone. Cover soup and refrigerate 8 hours to overnight. Discard thick fat on top of soup; reheat then serve.

herb-butter.name: Herb Butter
instructions: Pulse herbs and garlic in a food processor until finely chopped. Add butter, lemon zest, and lemon juice and process until smooth; season with salt and pepper.
DO AHEAD: Butter can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill. Bring to room temperature before using.

herb-salad-boiled-lezzet.name: Herb Salad (boiled)

ingredients.item: 1/2 kg of grass mixture (I used insweet and bitter radika)

instructions: 1. Take the dirt into boiling water, they are completely buried in the water by moving back slightly forward with maşa.
2. 3- Check after 4 minutes, if it is boiled, take it in the water and filter it.
3. Add salt to a small jar or bowl according to your taste, and add it on the whole sauce material and cook.
4. Take the grass warmly into the service plate and pour the sauce on it.

hibiscus-mint-granita.name: Hibiscus-mint Granita
instructions: Bring 2 cups water to a boil. Remove from the heat and steep the hibiscus flowers in the water for 5 to 7 minutes. Discard the hibiscus flowers. Add the sugar to the hot water and stir until melted. You may need to return it to the heat for a minute or two to dissolve the sugar. Remove from the heat and let cool to room temperature. Add the lime juice and chopped mint leaves.
Pour the liquid into a shallow bowl and place in the freezer. Freeze for 3 to 4 hours while mashing the large chunks of ice every 30 minutes or so.
Spoon the granita into chilled glasses and garnish with the whole mint leaves.

hollandaise.name: Hollandaise

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Melt butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Remove pan from heat; keep warm. Whisk egg yolks, 1 Tbsp. lemon juice, and 1 Tbsp. hot water in a medium metal bowl. Place bowl over a saucepan of barely simmering water (do not allow bottom of bowl to touch the water). Drizzle in the melted butter 2 Tbsp. at a time, whisking constantly, until all of the butter is fully incorporated and the sauce is thick. Season to taste with cayenne, salt, and pepper; add more lemon juice, if desired. Serve immediately.

honey-citrus-english-muffins.name: Honey Citrus English Muffins

ingredients.item: Of thomas® light multi-grain english muffins

instructions: Gently toss together the orange segments, grapefruit segments, and sugar in a medium bowl. Set aside until a syrup is made from the juices of the citrus, about 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, using a hand mixer, beat the mascarpone, whipping cream, and honey in a bowl on medium speed until light and fluffy, about 3 minutes.

Spread 2–3 tablespoons of the mascarpone mixture over the cut side of each toasted Thomas® Light Multi-Grain English Muffin half. Top evenly with the macerated segmented citrus and pistachios. Add a drizzle of honey. Sprinkle with the reserved citrus zests.
Enjoy!

honey-forest-bowl-recipe-comedera.name: Honey Forest Bowl Recipe

ingredients.item: ½ cup of low sodium soy sauce
2 ½ lb. of a bone-free time, cut into cubes (beef chuck root)
2  cebollitas tipo cambray, cortadas en rodajas finas

instructions: Retitle the ingredients before starting with production.
In a slow cooking pot, place the honey, soy sauce, mix well.
Add re stock, frosted garlic, mix and let cook for 1 minute.
It incorporates sesame oil, vinegar and ginger. It constantly mixes and removes.
Agrega a pasta de chile, la cebolla en polvo y la pimienta.
Con un batidor, combina todos los ingredientes. Agrega los cubitos de carne de res y revuelve para combinar con la salsa, hasta que todos los cubos de carne queden cubiertos.
Cover the pot and cook at low heat for 8 hours or at high heat for 4 hours.
In the last 30 minutes of cooking, before serving, separate kitchen 2 cups of rice following the instructions we have in this perfect rice recipe.
Cooking steamed broccoli in a vapor.
In the last 5 minutes, just before serving, add the ajonjolí seeds and cambray onions.
To serve, form a base of rice, about 1 / 3 cm of baked rice, place above the pits of beef and steamed broccoli.

honey-mustard-glazed-chicken-thighs-reci.name: Honey Mustard Glazed Chicken Thighs Recipe
honey-mustard-glazed-chicken-thighs-reci.original_name: Receta de muslos de pollo glaseados con miel y mostaza

ingredients.item: 1 cda conventional mustard ((optional for more texture))
Ramitas de romero o tomillo  ((opcional, para aromatizar) )

instructions: In a bowl, mix Honey, Dijon mustard, old mustard (if you use it), soybean sauce, apple vinegar, minced garlic, smoked peppermint, pepper and salt. Rewind well to integrate.
Cover the chicken thighs with half the frying and leave marines for at least 30 minutes in the refrigerator (can be up to 2 hours for more flavour).
Wrap up every thigh with a slice of tocinet and make sure it cover the flesh well. You can use wood chopsticks to fix them if necessary.
It purifies the oven at 200 been 3 been. Place your thighs on a plate with billing paper and baker for 30-35 minutes and brush with the remaining frying every 10 minutes.
In the last 5 minutes of cooking, the temperature will rise to 220 ″ 3 ″ or put into a grill mode so that the tocinet will get crispy and the glazing will be caramelized.
Retira del horno y deja reposar 5 minutos antes de servir. Puedes decorar con ramitas de romero o tomillo.

honey-lime-vinaigrette.name: Honey-lime Vinaigrette
instructions: Blend lime juice, honey, sugar, mustard, garlic powder, salt, black pepper, and cumin together in a blender; stream olive oil and canola oil into lime juice mixture while blending until well combined.

horseradish-dill-schmear.name: Horseradish-dill Schmear
instructions: Mix cream cheese, dill, and horseradish in a small bowl; season with salt.

hot-and-cold-sizzling-brownie.name: Hot And Cold Sizzling Brownie
instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C
In a bowl, add eggs and baker’s sugar and beat for 2-3 minutes.
Add butter and beat until well combined.
Add vanilla extract and cocoa powder and beat well. Fold in the flour.
Evenly spread the prepared batter in a 8 x 8-inch (20 x 20 cm) baking pan and bake for 20-25 minutes. When a toothpick comes out of the brownie cleanly, it is ready.
Let the brownie cool, then cut into slices.
For the chocolate syrup: In a saucepan, add chocolate, milk and cream, and whisk well until smooth. Cook until combined.
Heat a pan for 3-4 minutes until sizzling. Place brownie, a scoop of ice cream, and the chocolate syrup onto the pan and serve.

hot-apple-cider.name: Hot Apple Cider
instructions: Combine 1 gallon apple cider, 1 Tbsp. allspice berries, 1 tsp. freshly grated nutmeg, 4 whole cloves, and three 3" cinnamon sticks in a large pot. Scrape the seeds from 1 vanilla bean, split lengthwise, and add to pot along with the scraped pod. Bring cider just to a simmer over medium heat. Reduce to medium-low heat and cook just below a simmer until flavors meld and cider has reduced slightly, about 1 hour.

Strain spiced apple cider through a sieve into another pot or heatproof punch bowl; discard solids in sieve. Ladle hot apple cider into mugs. Top with brandy, Calvados, bourbon, or spiced rum to taste if using. 

Editor’s note: This recipe was first printed in our October 2012 issue. Head this way for more of our favorite apple recipes →

hot-honey-wings.name: Hot Honey Wings

ingredients.item: . bird chile powder or cayenne pepper
. diamond crystal or 1 0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Mix chile powder, salt, and 1 Tbsp. black pepper in a small bowl until well combined.

Arrange chicken wings in a single layer on a foil-lined rimmed baking sheet. Rub all over with spice mixture and let sit at room temperature at least 15 minutes, or cover and chill up to 1 day. If chilling, let sit at room temperature 1 hour before grilling.
Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 375°. Bake wings until slightly golden, 30–40 minutes. Remove from oven; let cool slightly.
Slice 1 lime in half and squeeze juice into a large bowl; mix in honey, fish sauce, and 3 Tbsp. chili crisp. Transfer chicken wings to bowl and toss to coat in hot honey glaze.

Prepare a grill for medium heat. Grill chicken wings and shishito peppers, turning occasionally, until chicken is deep golden brown and charred in spots and shishito peppers are blistered and charred in spots, 5–8 minutes.

Transfer chicken wings and shishito peppers to a platter; top with chiles, cilantro, and peanuts and drizzle more chili crisp over. Slice remaining lime into wedges and serve wings and shishito peppers with lime wedges for squeezing over.

how-to-blanch-tomatoes-to-peel-them-easi.name: How To Blanch Tomatoes To Peel Them Easily (in Water Or Microwave)
how-to-blanch-tomatoes-to-peel-them-easi.original_name: Cómo escaldar tomates para pelarlos de forma fácil (en agua o microondas)
instructions: Prepare a big pot of boiling water. With a sharp knife, make a small cross-shaped incision at the base of each tomato. That will help loosen skin and allow tomatoes to be cooked evenly. Prepare a large bowl with cold water and ice.
Put the tomatoes in the pot with boiling water for about 30 seconds. If tomatoes are too big, you may need to leave them a little longer, perhaps 1-2 minutes.

Remove the tomatoes from the boiling water with a scattering spoon and put them immediately into the bowl with cold water and ice. That will stop the cooking process and quickly cool the tomatoes, making them easy to peel.
Once the tomatoes are cold, remove them from water and wear their skin carefully. If the skin doesn't get out easily, put them back into boiling water for a few seconds and try again.

how-to-make-a-delicious-and-burger-bun-c.name: How To Make A Delicious And Burger Bun
how-to-make-a-delicious-and-burger-bun-c.original_name: Cómo hacer un rico y fácil pan para hamburguesa

Divide la masa en 8 partes iguales y forma bolas con cada pedazo.
It purifies the oven at 220ºC. place table balls on a plate for frying or with baking paper.
Cover the dough with a kitchen cloth and let stand for 10 minutes. After time, purify bread and sprinkle sesame seeds.

Retira del fuego y deja enfriar.

Revolves to integrate the ingredients, passes to an airy and cold container. Enjoy with your favorite sauces.

how-to-make-a-delicious-cream-of-peas-wi.name: How To Make A Delicious Cream Of Peas With Coconut Milk
how-to-make-a-delicious-cream-of-peas-wi.original_name: Cómo hacer una deliciosa crema de guisantes con leche de coco

2 cucharadas de hojas de cilantro fresco (picadas (opcional))

Remove the pot from the fire and let the mixture cool a little. Then, transfer everything to a blender and mix up to get a smooth and creamy consistency.
Vuelve a colocar la mezcla en la olla y agrega la leche de coco. Cocina a fuego medio durante unos 5 minutos, revolviendo constantemente.
Add salt and pepper to your taste and lemon juice if you wish. Serve hot cream and decorate with fresh cilantro leaves at your best.

how-to-make-a-delicious-roasted-tomato-t.name: How To Make A Delicious Roasted Tomato Toast With Feta Cheese
how-to-make-a-delicious-roasted-tomato-t.original_name: Cómo hacer una deliciosa tosta de tomates rostizados con queso feta

He's got his sandwiches in his hot frying pan till his bread's golden and his cheese's been melted.
Remove the frying pan sandwiches and open them with care. Add lettuce leaves and tomato cuts, then put back the sandwiches.
Ready to enjoy! Serves stuffed pork sandwiches with melted cheese, lettuce and tomato immediately.

while you're marching make the sour sauce.

You can add more of any of the ingredients of the salsa to achieve a smoother or tighter taste as you like.
Deja que se cocine durante 15 minutos revolviendo de vez en cuando. Una vez transcurrido el tiempo, apaga el fuego y deja reposar.
It pics onion and pimenton into medium cubes, with about the same size as the pig.

Ahora vamos a cocinar el cerdo.

Ahora ve agregando el cerdo que estabas marinando al bol con la mezcla del rebozado. Procura que cada pieza quede bien impregnada por todas sus caras.

Go and get those pieces of pork that are ready and put them on a plate with absorbent paper to remove their excess fat.

Now you just have to mix the beamed pork with the sour sauce, you can do it in 2 forms: put the pork into the frying pan with the sauce, mix well and serve or you can first serve the pork on a plate and then bath with the sauce up.
Once you have been made, you can enjoy this delicious local recipe of Chinese food.

how-to-make-creme-fraiche-step-by-step-c.name: How To Make Creme Fraiche Step By Step
how-to-make-creme-fraiche-step-by-step-c.original_name: Cómo hacer creme fraiche casera paso a paso

A liter of liquid cream with at least 1 / 3 of a fat content

We have to scramble and scramble till both products are fully integrated and we only have to see a homogenous cream.
Later we will place the container with the mixture at a place with a stable, warm but pleasant temperature about 21 degrees. The container should be closed and preferably a glass container.

how-to-make-decorated-easter-cookies-peq.name: How To Make Decorated Easter Cookies
how-to-make-decorated-easter-cookies-peq.original_name: Cómo hacer galletas de Pascua decoradas

In a bowl we mix the flour with the powder yeast. We added sugar, steamed sugar, butter and egg and we amassed everything up to a smooth mass.

We form a ball with the dough, wrap it up in clear film and cold it into the refrigerator for half an hour. Once this time has passed, we tighten up the work surface and extend the mass with a roller.
Cortamos las galletas con los moldes de galletas de Pascua. Nosotros hemos hecho algunos Huevos de Pascua, conejos de Pascua y corderitos con estos cortadores de galletas de Pascua.
We put the cookies in the plate and put them into the pressurized oven. We baked for about 10 minutes at 180 °.

For frying, we mix sugar with water or lemon juice and get a thick frying. You can color the white glazing with a few drops of food dyes to make different colors (the less food dyes, the lighter or cake will be).

We pinch the cookies with the frying and we decorate at our best or at the best of our children's best and they will have a great time decorating the cookies. We can decorate for instance using pastry pencils of different colors to paint onto different motif cookies or whatever we think. We wait a half hour till the frying has been completely dried and we can have our precious Easter cookies or wrap them and give them to our loved ones.

Add padded and optionally frosted ginger and hot sauce (you can buy them here) or paddle and mix them well.
Add some roasted sesame seeds if you like them and serve the salsa in a small bowl as an accompaniment for your gyozas.

how-to-make-kfc-style-chicken-in-an-airf.name: How To Make Kfc Style Chicken In An Airfryer
how-to-make-kfc-style-chicken-in-an-airf.original_name: Cómo hacer pollo estilo KFC en airfryer

ingredients.item: 1  pollo cortado en piezas  ((muslos, pechugas, alas))

While we heat up the oil, we can get some churros and leave them on a surface, till the oil's hot. as they're golden, we'll get them out and if we want to remove the excess fat, we'll put them onto a plate covered with an absorbent paper sheet. Then with the hot churros we'll put them through the plate with the sugar, both sides.

hummus-dinner-bowls.name: Hummus Dinner Bowls

ingredients.prep: or a vegetarian alternative such as lightlife® smart ground

ingredients.item: Cherry tomatoes or 2 medium heirloom or beefsteak tomatoes

ingredients.prep: lemon wedges, Aleppo-style pepper, hot sauce, pickles, and pita (for serving; optional)

instructions: Heat oil in a large heavy, preferably cast-iron, skillet over high. Pat beef (or vegetarian alternative) dry with paper towels, then press into an even layer in skillet with a spatula. Season with coriander, pepper, cinnamon, and 1 tsp. salt and cook, undisturbed, until a brown crust begins to form underneath, about 6 minutes. Turn, break beef into pieces, and continue to cook, stirring, until just cooked through, about 1 minute.
Meanwhile, toss tomatoes, parsley, lemon juice, and remaining 1 tsp. salt in a medium bowl.

Divide hummus among shallow bowls. Using the back of a spoon, smooth into an even layer, then create a wide divot in the center. Spoon spiced beef and tomato mixture over, then drizzle with oil and sprinkle with Aleppo-style pepper, if using. Serve with lemon wedges, hot sauce, pickles, and pita alongside, if using.
